name: How do I know if a lawyer got referred to me by AI and not a real network?
description: Ask the firm directly and check for AI tools like CloudLex in their process.[4]

mainEntity.name: How do I know if a lawyer got referred to me by AI and not a real network?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask the firm directly and check for AI tools like CloudLex in their process.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Ask directly in your consultation if AI tools were used in matching or intake, and check firm websites for AI disclosure. Tools like CloudLex facilitate AI-driven attorney referral networks for personal injury cases.[4] Key factors: review referral fee agreements for AI involvement, search firm name + 'AI referrals', verify human oversight. In NY/LA, courts scrutinize AI in litigation but not pre-referral.[8] Request proof of referral source to ensure quality.
